content: Acetylcholine levels drop to zero during deep sleep, supporting proper sleep stages.
Taking acetylcholinesterase inhibitors like alpha-GPC may interfere with deep sleep, according to a study.
Dr. Chris Masterjohn suggests taking alpha-GPC in the morning and afternoon, avoiding late afternoon doses.
Ginkgo biloba may interfere with deep sleep due to its acetylcholinesterase inhibitory effects.
Dr. Masterjohn recommends experimenting with alpha-GPC before bedtime if REM sleep is low, based on sleep tracking data.
Ancestral Supplements offers Living Collagen, a nose-to-tail supplement line supporting ancestral dietary beliefs.
